name: Ivara Prime
description: As regal and lethal as a nighttime wood, this is the queen of the hunt in her ultimate form.

abilities.name: Quiver
abilities.description: Cycle through and shoot one of four tactical arrows. Cloak creates a stationary bubble that cloaks Ivara and allies. Dashwire creates a traversable zipline. Noise emits a high-pitched sound that attracts enemies to it. Sleep temporarily puts nearby enemies into a deep slumber.

abilities.name: Navigator
abilities.description: Assume control of any projectile launched by Ivara and guide it to the target.

abilities.name: Prowl
abilities.description: Become invisible and steal loot from unsuspecting enemies or take out prey with deadly headshots.

abilities.name: Artemis Bow
abilities.description: Summon a mighty bow and unleash a volley of devastating arrows.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: As regal and lethal as a nighttime wood, this is the queen of the hunt in her ultimate form.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Ivara Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Ivara Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Ivara Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6
patchlogs.changes: This is to address that Split Flight cannot be equipped on the Lenz, Kuva Bramma, or Ivara’s Artemis Bow.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Ivara: 65 to 100
Ivara Prime: 65 to 125
Why: This is more of a Review and clean up for some of the less-rewarding aspects of missions. Right now the base Solar Map nodes exist to progress from planet to planet, while providing either general rewards (Mods, Credits) or specific return rewards (Ivara, Nidus, etc). By getting rid of the lower value items on the general rewards, people playing for the first time should come across a bit of a bump in their resources and credits. We have more plans for this to write about at a later date.
Ivara Prime’s starry night FX when invisible will apply to any form of invisibility, not just her abilities (Prowl, Cloak Arrow).
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atavist Prime Knee Plates sitting off-center on the Ivara Kuvael Skin.

Practice stealth as you track your prey, then strike with ruthless precision as Ivara Prime! No hunt is complete without the Baza Prime and Aksomati Prime!
You can find Ivara Prime, Baza Prime, and Aksomati Prime Relics in their classic spots (Void, Derelict, Defense, Survival, etc) with the addition of Railjack missions 
Get the newest Prime gear with Ivara Prime Access and Prime Accessories here: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a long-standing bug-turned-exploit with Ivara’s Noise Arrow that we’d like to explain in detail so you can understand why we have chosen to fix it now. The old bug is as follows: Enemies who are attracted to Ivara’s Noise Arrow never regain intelligence if Ivara is invisible. The fix allows them to ‘finish’ their investigation of the noise and thus regain some form of intelligence.  This was exploitable in conjunction with the way that Interception missions work, and has been in the game for quite a long time on our end. 
Fixed the Huntress Bundle diorama in the Market displaying Nova instead of Ivara. 
Fixed Ghouls, Ratel, and Wolf of Saturn Six targeting your Sentinel when it and you are both invisible (eg: Ivara's Prowl, Loki’s Invisibility, etc.).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a performance bug with Warframe’s with an Ability selector function (Ivara’s Quiver, etc.)

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.15.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed headshot and kill sounds being occluded during Loki’s Invisibility and Ivara’s Prowl abilities.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.13.0
patchlogs.changes: Ivara’s Prowl will now only steal from each enemy once total, instead of once per Ivara. Our intent is to mirror how Nekros’ Desecrate also functions, considering the recent movement of Sentient Cores to certain Sentient variants. It’s rewarding to be the warmly welcomed Nekros in an Argon Crystal run, and we hope Ivara will now be welcomed equivalently.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.11.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Specters not being able to use Ability weapons with 0 max clip size (eg. Ivara's Artemis Bow).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when casting Ivara’s Prowl.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Warframe Specters are now much smarter! If you don't recall, Specters are craftable gear you can equip to summon an AI companion in battle. We've done a general intelligence pass on their proficiency with Weapons, and we've also updated their power-casting logic. Virtually every power is now castable with only a few exceptions! Specters CANNOT cast the following Abilities: Vauban's Minelayer, Ivara's Zipline, Titania's Razorwing, Nekros’ Desecrate and Shadows of the Dead, Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Valkyr’s Hysteria, Wukong’s Primal Fury, Cloud Walker, and Defy, Atlas’ Petrify and Tectonics, Limbo's entire kit (save for the damage aspect of Banish), and finally Zephyr’s Dive Bomb.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Mutalist Cernos visual FX only appearing for a few seconds when used with Ivara’s Navigator.
Fixed Ivara permanently receiving a ‘Power in Use’ error after having her Artemis Bow stolen by a Drahk Master as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/626121-ivara-loses-all-combat-ability-if-you-cast-artemis-bow-while-disarmed-by-a-drahk-master/
Fixed Ivara’s arrow texture showing as black.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Ivara Quiver Conclave Augment 
Ivara’s Encumbered Arrow now has a 2m AoE and its duration increased to 5 seconds in Conclave.
Ivara’s Null Shield Arrow duration increased to 5 seconds in Conclave.
Ivara’s Sleep Arrow now has diminishing returns against boss-type enemies.
Ivara’s Prowl will no longer be able to steal from boss-type enemies.
Fixed Ivara’s Navigator Ability causing arrows shot by her Artemis Bow to fly off course.
Fixed Ivara’s Dashwire causing players to fall out of the level when used to walk into an area that would normally teleport the player in-bounds.
Fixed an issue where picking up an item while using Ivara’s Artemis Bow would cause the player to be unable to drop the object, or have it disappear forever.
Fixed Ivara’s agile unarmed idle animation clipping through her hood.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara’s Artemis Bow not properly getting buffs from Rifle Mods.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara’s Dashwire Arrow allowing players to escape underwater with Archwing, getting stuck outside of water on the Grineer Underwater Sealab Tileset.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.1: Operation Shadow Debt.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Ivara’s Cloak Arrow not attaching properly to its targets as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/577317-cloak-arrow-bug/
Fixed an additional ‘00’ appearing in Ivara’s custom arrow HUD in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.3.1 + 18.3.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara’s Sleep Arrow timer not properly displaying for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara’s Quiver getting stuck on a single arrow type if the player activated the ability using their ‘Use Selected Power’ hotkey while Navigator was active.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.2.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an error preventing players from using their weapons or abilities after using Ivara, Valkyr or Excalibur’s 4th Ability Power.
Fixed an error that would prevent Clients from being able to use their powers as Valkyr, Wukong, Ivara or Excalibur if meleeing while their 4th Ability Power was ending, or being deactivated due to a Nullifier bubble.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Ivara
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Clients not properly seeing visual FX created by Ivara’s Sleep Arrow.
Fixed Ivara’s Agile idle animation using her Artemis Bow as a prop, causing other Warframes using the animation to look a bit unusual.
Fixed Ivara’s Artemis Bow HUD appearing while Ivara is carrying the Operator in the Second Dream Quest.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Slightly adjusted Ivara’s Artemis Bow’s fire and draw audio FX.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some particle FX on Ivara’s Navigator Ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.6 + 18.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Ivara’s Cloak Arrow causing permanent invisibility when used on Chroma’s Effigy.
Fixed the Daikyu unintentionally breaking Ivara’s Prowl.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Ivara’s ziplines not always being flush with the walls they end on.
Fixed some of Ivara’s Ability FX playing too loudly.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Targets affected by Ivara’s Slumber Arrow will now wake up early if their health drops below 50% (just like Equinox's Rest).
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the energy drain of Ivara's Navigator increasing dramatically on any cast beyond the first.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Salix Syandana: Ivara’s cocoon-like Syandana.
patchlogs.fixes:
Ivara’s Abilities are as follows:
Obtain Ivara today through the Market or through Easy, Medium and Hard Spy missions!
